markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content cadence, performance, and new AI visibility tools.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Cadence Clarified:** Guides will publish at 25/week (paid for 10) to quickly capture \~380 high-value keywords, then revert to 10/week. A 5-template backlog from an engineering publishing error will be cleared this week.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Template Strategy Shift:** January template purchases declined MoM. The strategy will shift from pure SEO to building templates for robust projects (e.g., e-commerce) that require a paid subscription, moving beyond projects achievable with free credits.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**New AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX is deploying "Check That," a new platform to track LLM visibility. Megan will validate its prompt list to ensure it's an accurate baseline before granting Lovable access.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

## Topics

### Content Cadence & Backlog

  - [**Guides:** Publishing at 25/week (paid for 10) to quickly capture \~380 high-value keywords. The cadence will revert to 10/week once the keyword list is exhausted.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Templates:** A 5-template backlog from last week will be published this week. The delay was caused by an engineering publishing workflow error, not a content creation issue.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### January Performance Review

  - [**Guides:** Clicks surged 248% MoM, validating the high-volume publishing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**Templates:** Purchases declined MoM. This is specific to templates, as overall platform activity increased in January.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Strong across the board, especially for guides.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Primary Metric:** Organic purchases are the key metric for reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### New Template Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The current SEO-driven template strategy may not align with user needs or drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**Goal:** Balance SEO with templates that drive paid subscriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**Focus:** Build templates for robust projects (e.g., e-commerce) that require a paid plan, not simple projects achievable with free credits.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [**Action:** Sam will provide data on what users are building to inform the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

### New AI Visibility Tool: "Check That"

  - [**Purpose:** A new platform (replacing Scrunch) to track LLM visibility (position, sentiment, citation share).](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [**Status:** Megan will validate the prompt list to ensure it's an accurate baseline before granting Lovable access.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Prompt Selection:** Prompts are based on company context, competitors, audience personas, and business vision.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

### Template Page UI Preview

  - [**Feature:** A preview of the new template category filters was shared.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [**Feedback:** The category buttons have inconsistent widths and should be made uniform.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**Future Feature:** Pagination will be added when a category exceeds 10 templates.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Ensure the 5-template backlog is published this week.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Flag the inconsistent button widths on the template page UI preview for the engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [Validate the "Check That" prompt list and grant Lovable access.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [CC Tom (Lovable SEO) on the template page UI preview for review.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Sam:**](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [Provide data on what users are building to inform the new template strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
      - [Schedule an in-person meeting for next Monday during Sam's visit.](https://fathom.video/share/qLmwaShfSHMbBSDAvoeChsqYyz8Zp5Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
